step_rationale: LPS-derived immunogenic lipid; activates innate immunity in plaque inflammation.
mechanism: 3-Hydroxyfatty acid from LPS-containing lipoproteins activates innate immune sensors and plaque inflammation.

references.title: Characterization of the LPS and 3OHFA Contents in the Lipoprotein Fractions and Lipoprotein Particles of Healthy Men.
